ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Illustriss. et Excellentiss. Domino D. Francesco Caietano Sermonetae Duci, & c. Rogerius Caietanus D. D. D.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, si videbitur Reverendiss. Pat. Mag. Sac. Pal. Apost. A Rivaldus Vicesg. -- Imprimatur. Fr. Vincentius Fanus, Magister, & Socius Reverendiss. Pat. Fr. Vincentij Candidi, Mag. Sacri Palatij Apostolici, Ordinis Praedicatorum

Essay.EssayTitle: Illustrissimo Domino Abbati Rogerio Caetano. Epigramma

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
